title: DU-2: Реализация Agent Mode + Git-based review
description: Реализовать extension loom: Agent Mode, Executor loop, subagent spawner, worker/reviewer runtime, git-based review flow. Pi CLI верифицирован PoC (INV-14). Эта подзадача изолирована из TASK-2026-0001-bootstrap.

invariants.marker: INVARIANT: Subagents use clean sessions; context is assembled from explicit files, not implicit state
invariants.verification_method: Subagent spawner uses --no-context-files; context injected via inputArtifact only

invariants.text: Git-based review: reviewer анализирует артефакты, не сессию
invariants.marker: INVARIANT: Review artifact references git commit hash; reviewer analyzes git diff, not live session
invariants.verification_method: Review.json contains target.commit; reviewer tools: git show, read file, write review.json

invariants.text: Executor не пишет код: только оркестрирует worker + reviewer
invariants.marker: INVARIANT: Executor tools: spawn_worker, spawn_reviewer, update_task_status, read_artifact. NO write/edit/commit in executor tools
invariants.verification_method: Executor prompt explicitly lists allowed tools; write/edit excluded

invariants.marker: INVARIANT: Model config in subagent-config.json; no hardcoded model strings in extension code
invariants.verification_method: Code review: all model references load from subagent-config.json

invariants.text: Исполнение строго последовательное: шаг N → worker → reviewer → шаг N+1
invariants.marker: INVARIANT: Executor loop cannot spawn more than one worker simultaneously
invariants.verification_method: Executor loop state machine: single active_worker_id; new spawn blocked while active

invariants.text: Локализация: UI и пользовательские артефакты — русский; AI-документация — английский
invariants.marker: INVARIANT: All system prompts, JSON schemas, code comments in English; operator-facing text in Russian; machine markers in English
invariants.verification_method: Localization guard check on all markdown derivatives; English-only audit on schemas and prompts

invariants.text: Git commit safety: не git add -A, а staged по списку
invariants.marker: INVARIANT: Worker commits only files listed in files-to-commit.json; no mass add
invariants.verification_method: Worker writes files-to-commit.json; git add --pathspec-from-file; executor validates against plan expected_output

invariants.text: Pi CLI верифицирован: все флаги для subagent spawner подтверждены PoC
invariants.marker: INVARIANT: pi CLI supports --mode json, --system-prompt, --model, --session-dir, --tools; subagent spawner is feasible
invariants.verification_method: PoC report: artifacts/poc-pi-cli-report.md; flags tested: --mode json, --system-prompt $(cat file), --model, --session-dir, --tools, --no-context-files

delivery_units.purpose: Implementation: extension, Plan Mode, Agent Mode, subagent spawner, git review flow
